arts.ttl: AZ v Tottenham, Fenerbahce v Rangers: Europa League last 16, first legs – live
arts.sum: Clockwatch updates from all the 5.45pm GMT kick-offs Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | And mail Yara Hello and welcome to our clockwatch of the second greatest club competition in Europe! Fine, the Europa League may not not have the champions of France, England and Spain tonight but tonight we get to see Tottenham and Rangers – true heavyweights in Europe … In all seriousness, the Europa League may have a rap for lacking in pure quality but more than makes up for it in drama, upsets and pure smash and grabs. Like last night in the Champions League (but worse). Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fenerbahce vs Rangers LIVE as Hamza Igamane benched but John Souttar returns to face Mourinho's men
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson faces a huge match early in his spell as interim Ibrox boss and is up against a legendary manager

arts.ttl: Ex Rangers captain sees son follows in his footsteps six years after bitter Ibrox exit
arts.sum: The former skipper stuck with the Light Blues during the dark days and was beaming with pride

arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul ahead of UEL match
arts.sum: A Rangers fan has died in Istanbul ahead of the Scottish club's Europa League match against Fenerbahce on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul ahead of match
arts.sum: Reports in the Turkish press suggest that the man was crossing the road in the early hours when he was hit by a car.

arts.ttl: Robert Snodgrass donates £1k to fundraiser for Rangers fan who died in Istanbul as total reaches almost £30k
arts.sum: The ex Scotland international contributed after the tragic news in Turkey

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho's Rangers comment bodes well for Steven Gerrard return hopes
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has had his say on Rangers' managerial situation, with rumours of a potential Steven Gerrard return to Ibrox intensifying ahead of the Gers' Europa League clash with Fenerbahce

arts.ttl: Rangers 49ers takeover blueprint emerges as Leeds sporting director hunt throws up clues
arts.sum: The Ibrox giants are also on the lookout for a new sporting director to work alongside Nils Koppen

arts.ttl: Rangers XI vs Fenerbahce – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers travel to Turkey to face Fenerbahce in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie tonight. The Scottish side are enduring a tough period, following three shock defeats – all on home soil – in their last five fixtures.
